name: Dynatrace MCP Server
description: MCP server providing agents with tools to query Dynatrace Grail, execute DQL queries, retrieve problem details, monitor Kubernetes events, and analyze vulnerabilities. Designed for agents to access contextualized observability intelligence within agentic workflows.
capabilities: Query Dynatrace Grail in natural language
pricing: Free trial available; pricing depends on Dynatrace subscription
notes: Designed to enable secure and governed interactions between AI agents and Dynatrace. Supports both observability and security use cases. Natural language query capability reduces agent engineering overhead.
